description_long: This chest of drawers features a tall, rectangular frame with a two-tone finish: a warm brown wooden top and a light gray painted body. The front displays a total of seven drawers, with two smaller drawers at the top and five larger drawers below, each adorned with simple round ring handles. The sides are flat and unadorned, matching the light gray color of the front, while the back is finished in a solid brown wood panel. The legs are slightly tapered, giving the piece a subtle elegance and stability. The overall design is classic and functional, suitable for both traditional and modern urban interiors. The construction appears to be primarily wood, with metal hardware for the handles.
description: A tall, two-tone chest of drawers with a brown wooden top, light gray painted body, and seven drawers with ring handles. The design is classic and functional, featuring tapered legs and a solid wood back.
description_view_0: Front view showing all seven drawers with ring handles and the two-tone color scheme.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the flat, light gray painted panel and the brown wooden top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a solid brown wood panel with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a flat, light gray painted panel and brown wooden top.
